mapper.select: select id, title, description, price, type, create_time from subscription_package order by id desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subscription_package (title, description, price, type, status, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{type}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE subscription_package
title = #{title},
description = #{description},
price = #{price},
type = #{type},
WHERE id = #{id}
